LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Takeoff_Desc: Select a point along the takeoff heading.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Move_Desc: Fly to the selected map position, then enter a holding circle.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Loiter_Desc: Circle around the selected map position.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Land_Desc: Approach and land at the selected map position.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_AbortLanding_Desc: Cancel the landing approach and enter a holding circle.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_NotSpawned: This aircraft is not on a map.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_TakeoffTooShort: Select a takeoff point at least {0} cells away.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_TakeoffRunwayBlocked: The takeoff path must be clear of terrain, structures, plants, pawns, and items.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_LandingRunwayBlocked: The landing path must be clear of terrain, structures, plants, pawns, and items.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_LandingTurnTooSharp: The landing approach would require a turn sharper than {0} degrees.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_SelectFuel_Desc: Select which allowed item colonists will use to refuel this aircraft.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_NoAllowedFuel: This aircraft has no allowed fuel definitions.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_OutOfFuelLanding: The aircraft has run out of fuel and is making an emergency landing.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_BoardPilot_Desc: Order a colonist to board this aircraft as its pilot.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_BoardPassenger_Desc: Order a colonist to board this aircraft as a passenger.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Disembark_Desc: Select an occupant to leave this aircraft.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_LoadCargo_Desc: Designate an item stack for colonists to load into this aircraft.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_CancelCargo_Desc: Clear all pending cargo designations for this aircraft.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_EjectCargo_Desc: Place all loaded cargo beside this aircraft.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Manifest_Airborne: The manifest cannot be changed while airborne.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_InvalidOccupant: That pawn cannot board this aircraft.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_PilotOccupied: This aircraft already has a pilot.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_BoardingJobRejected: {0} could not start the boarding job.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_NoPendingCargo: There is no cargo waiting to be loaded.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_NoPilotForTakeoff: A capable pilot must be aboard before takeoff.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_PilotIncapacitatedLanding: The pilot is incapacitated or missing. The aircraft is making an emergency landing.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_LoadBomb_Desc: Designate a compatible bomb stack for colonists to load into the bomb bay.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_CancelBombLoad_Desc: Clear all pending bomb loading designations.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_UnloadBombs_Desc: Unload every bomb from the bomb bay.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_DropBomb_Desc: Release one bomb. An asymmetric wing load reduces turn rate until balance is restored. Predicted forward travel: {0} cells. Maximum longitudinal and lateral error: {1} cells.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_BombBay_Airborne: The bomb load cannot be changed while airborne.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_InvalidBomb: That item is not a compatible aircraft bomb.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_BombBayFull: The bomb bay has reached its mass limit.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_NoPendingBombs: There are no bombs waiting to be loaded.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_NoLoadedBombs: There are no bombs in the bomb bay.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Bombing_NotAirborne: Bombs can only be dropped while airborne.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Bombing_NoPilot: A capable pilot is required to drop bombs.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Bombing_Cooldown: The bomb release mechanism is cycling.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Bombing_NoBomb: No bomb of that type remains.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Bombing_InvalidProjectile: The bomb has no valid projectile definition.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Bombing_OutOfRange: Weapon range ({0}) must be greater than the current altitude ({1}).
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_VanillaCargo_Desc: Open RimWorld's standard transporter loading dialog for this aircraft.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_VanillaCargoCancel_Desc: Cancel the current vanilla transporter loading plan.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_CargoLoadingIncomplete: Assigned cargo has not finished loading.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_ConfigureBombs_Desc: Configure the center hardpoint and mirrored wing hardpoints. Colonists will load the selected bombs automatically.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_NoAllowedBombDefs: No compatible bomb definitions are available.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_BombLoadoutOverMass: Requested bomb mass ({0} kg) exceeds bomb bay capacity ({1} kg).
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_BombLoadoutIncomplete: The configured bomb loadout is not fully loaded or contains asymmetric bombs.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_BombLoadout_Symmetric: Wing hardpoints are linked in mirrored pairs. Each selection installs the same bomb and quantity on both sides.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_BombSlot_Invalid: That bomb hardpoint does not exist.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_BombSlot_CountInvalid: {0} allows at most {1} bombs per slot.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Expedition_Desc: Fly to the map edge and form an aircraft caravan on the world map.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_ExpeditionCancel_Desc: Cancel the flight to the map edge and resume loitering.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Expedition_NotReady: The aircraft must be in normal flight to begin an expedition.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Expedition_MissingWorldDef: The aircraft expedition world object definition is missing.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Expedition_TransferFailed: The aircraft could not be transferred to the world map.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_WorldSend_Desc: Select a world tile and fly there. One-way range: {0} tiles. Round-trip range: {1} tiles. Fuel use: {2} per tile.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_WorldSend_AlreadyTraveling: The aircraft is already in transit.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_WorldSend_NoFuel: There is not enough fuel for a one-tile flight.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_WorldSend_OutOfRange: That destination is outside the aircraft's one-way range.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_WorldSend_TargetOutOfRange: Out of range. Distance: {0}; one-way range: {1}.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_WorldSend_TargetRoundTrip: Round trip possible. Distance: {0} tiles; outbound fuel: {1}.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_WorldSend_TargetOneWay: One way only. Distance: {0} tiles; outbound fuel: {1}.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Strafe_Desc: Select the center of a {0}-cell fixed-gun strafing line. The aircraft descends to altitude {1}; all {3} guns fire simultaneously at {2} RPM per gun.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_CancelStrafe_Desc: Cancel the current approach or strafing run and return to cruise altitude.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Strafe_NotFlying: The aircraft must be in normal flight before beginning a strafing run.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Strafe_ExpeditionDeparture: A strafing run cannot begin while the aircraft is leaving the map.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Strafe_NoPilot: A capable pilot is required for a strafing run.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Strafe_AlreadyActive: A strafing run is already active.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Strafe_InvalidGun: The mounted aircraft gun has no valid projectile.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Strafe_OutOfRange: The mounted gun range ({0}) must exceed the strafing altitude ({1}).
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Strafe_InvalidLine: A valid strafing line could not be created at that position.
LanguageData.HD_Aircraft_Strafe_TurnTooSharp: The strafing approach would require a turn sharper than {0} degrees.
